S-AGENT.notes: Stable AgentID now admits only authenticated version+1 rotations by the active key or the committed human recovery threshold while keeping genesis/controller identity fixed; intents bind current key/version plus exact mandate, capability, job, chain, profile, object, direction, budget, deadline and nonce. Delegated grants must strictly attenuate parent depth/scope/budget/expiry. Irreversible mandates require a compensation action. The existing ActionRouter remains the only contract-effect path and rechecks grant, mandate, key version and class epoch at dispatch. Falsifiers cover key-rotation identity theft, replay, cross-job/chain/profile substitution, scope, expiry, revocation races, monotone budgets, delegation widening, hostile text and unknown action types. Local deterministic evidence only; named production experiment owner and independent production exploit corpus remain external blockers.

S-FREYSA.notes: ReceiveDonation is a typed inward action. A mandate commits action and direction independently of untrusted text; changing it to Transfer under incoming-donation language is denied before budget spend. The non-ignored deterministic battery executes exactly 100,000 multilingual/paraphrase/tool-injection mutations with zero outgoing effects, meeting the local registered threshold. This is a regression corpus, not a general jailbreak-immunity claim; named production owner remains external.

S-COMMERCE.notes: ACP lifecycle is an acyclic single-terminal state machine with 13 exhaustively enumerated maximal paths. Terminal states cannot be rewritten. Chain/profile/job/request-bound artifact availability starts the challenge deadline; withholding leaves it unset and reaches timeout refund. Delivery remains separate from Q0 quality. Settlement atomically consumes typed escrow/execution/dispute resources, rejects cross-job reuse and replay, and conserves escrow exactly across provider/evaluator/client credits. Lab fault injection is deterministic; no production evaluator/provider-duration evidence is claimed.

S-ATTRIBUTION.notes: ContributionGraph binds marginal evaluations to provenance, rejects contributor/evaluator self-dealing and evidence laundering, deduplicates evaluator failure domains, quotients sybil splits by declared contributor failure domain, and applies deterministic decay. Synthetic ground truth measures max error below 10% and wash-derived credit below 1%; a clone split mints zero aggregate credit. AttributionReport has consensus weight exactly zero and is advisory provenance, not objective ownership. Real-world independence and cartel resistance remain external.

S-ACCESS.notes: PARTIAL local precursor: PortableAccessManifest commits local, threshold-recovery and portable-backup identity paths plus content-addressed replicas. Validation requires at least three distinct declared failure domains for identity and each artifact, rejects ambiguous replicas, and the deterministic partition drill removes every pair in turn while recovering identity plus the retained artifact through the survivor; execution is typed OffConsensus and inference outage cannot stop the base chain. The registered threshold requires genuinely independent paths. No three independently operated provider/path drill exists locally, so the row must remain PARTIAL/EXTERNAL_BLOCKED.

S-TWIN-PROFILE.notes: TwinProfile is a content-derived advisory-profile identity distinct from its owner and contains observations/models/uncertainty plus explicit question and capability scopes. Consent checks bind principal, purpose, Evaluate right and expiry. Query/effect-proposal permits carry the profile revocation epoch and are rechecked at use; revocation races, stale permits, consent spoofing, out-of-scope questions/capabilities and profile substitution fail closed. The only output is TwinRecommendation with AUTHORITY=None; display identity is explicitly AdvisoryProfile, never the person.

I-AGENT.notes: AgentProtocolObject composes the existing ActionRouter/Firewall, declared-lineage reputation and ACP escrow/dispute state without adding consensus. One deterministic drill applies all four registered attacks: 12-signature clone farm collapses to weight 1 below quorum 3; exact mandate/envelope replay is rejected; key rotation between route and dispatch invalidates the stolen ticket; and a globally linear execution right cannot settle a second job while the first settlement conserves escrow. The dedicated runner also re-executes the canonical C:/tmp/chorus-quorum-lab and C:/tmp/nel-quarantine-lab fixtures and gates their clone-collapse, exhaustive quarantine, double-payout and cross-job reuse metrics. Component and composition evidence remain lab scale; named production owner is unresolved.

notes: AgentCommerceClaims owns only S-AGENT, S-FREYSA, S-COMMERCE, S-ATTRIBUTION, S-ACCESS, S-TWIN-PROFILE and I-AGENT. Registry source was not edited.
